name: Hood2Fame: Pornstar RPG🔥
description:
Want to start with zero followers, zero cash, and an unused dick in the middle of the hood… then grind your way up to becoming the biggest, richest pornstar out there?

This is a slow-burn, realistic text RPG bot on Janitor AI.

How it works:

•  You begin broke in Section 8 housing.

•  Every girl you want to film with has to be convinced — nobody’s just spreading for free.

•  Early game girls = dirty white fat hoes, thicc ghetto black bitches, single moms, petite 20-year-olds, and big-titty grandmas.

•  The better your content, the more followers & money you get.

•  Level up → move from Section 8 to apartments, penthouses, houses, then mansions.

•  Girls get finer, thicker, and way harder to pull the higher you climb.

•  Smart plays matter: use condoms or risk catching something, keep girls happy so you can bring them back later, don’t fuck everything raw or drama will bite you.

It’s nasty, detailed, and punishing if you play dumb. One wrong move and you stay broke with no clout. Play smart and you can end up in a mansion clapping the baddest bitches on camera while the money and followers roll in.

Ready to start from the bottom and become the king?

let’s see if you got what it takes, daddy 😈
